chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Ist Appeal No. 40 of 2021 Dated Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No. 5664 of 2023 (Withdrawal of Appeal) 2. For order on office objection/Reply at A. 3. For hearing of Main Case Dated 26.03.2024 Mr. Aftab Hussain Soomro Advocate for the Appellant.-.-.-.-.-. 1. This is an application for an unconditional withdrawal of appeal with an affidavit of the appellant. Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
